roa.docketEntryComment: CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ALLEGATION 	, ACCESS TO DRUGS IN VIOLATION OF SPECIAL CONDITION 5, ANDALLEGATION #10, ACCESS TO WEAPONS, TO WIT, A KNIFE AND BB GUN ARE ADDED,/ /X: ADMITS VIOLATIONS 	 AND #10/3000REIN/PAJ: 135 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIMELOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 29 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:ADMISSION IS LIMITED TO PURPOSES OF PAROLE AND NOT TO BE USED IN ANY OTHER PROSECUTION,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON DA 3056 PETITION/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/X: TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING,/4011,5/X: FOR DEFENDANT'S BACK INJURY,/CONTD: PRC ELIGIBILITY-ASSESSMENT AND RECEIPT OF PC 4011,5 REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:PRC ELIGIBILITY ASSESSMENT/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/CONT/
